startPoint.en: Talk to the Guildmaster inside the Champions' Guild, south of Varrock.
startPoint.es: Habla con el Guildmaster dentro del Champions' Guild, al sur de Varrock.

items.name: Crayfish cage
items.display: A crayfish cage or lobster pot (tool belt does not work)

items.name: Map part (Lozar)
items.display: To obtain one of the map parts, specifically map part (Lozar), you need to do one of the following: Bring 10,000 coins to buy it A weapon to kill Wormbrain. You can either use Telekinetic Grab or utilise area loot to obtain it.

items.name: Wormbrain
items.display: A weapon to kill Wormbrain. You can either use Telekinetic Grab or utilise area loot to obtain it.

items.name: Steel nails
items.display: 90 steel nails (other metal nails will not work)

items.name: Anti-dragon shield
items.display: An anti-dragon shield (will be obtained during quest) or super antifire potion

rewards.name: Maze key
rewards.display: Maze key, giving access to Melzar's Maze

rewards.name: Herald capes
rewards.display: Access to the dragon crest on herald capes

text.en: Talk to the Guildmaster in the Champions' Guild. (opciones de chat: 2 Can I have a quest? • Accept)
text.es: Habla con el Guildmaster en el Champions' Guild. (opciones de chat: 2 Can I have a quest? • Accept)

text.en: Talk to Oziach in the house directly north of the Edgeville lodestone. (opciones de chat: 1 Can you sell me a rune platebody? • 1 The Guildmaster of the Champions' Guild told me. • 1 I thought you were going to give me a quest. • 1 A dragon, that sounds like fun.)
text.es: Habla con Oziach en la casa justo al norte de la lodestone de Edgeville. (opciones de chat: 1 Can you sell me a rune platebody? • 1 The Guildmaster of the Champions' Guild told me. • 1 I thought you were going to give me a quest. • 1 A dragon, that sounds like fun.)

text.en: Go back to the Guildmaster and talk about the map pieces to get the key, about protection against dragon breath, and about buying a boat. (opciones de chat: 2 I talked to Oziach... • 1 How can I find the route to Crandor? • 1 Where is Melzar's Map piece? • 1 Where is Thalzar's Map piece? • 2 Where is Lozar's Map piece? • 3 Where can I find the right ship? • 2 How can I protect myself from the dragon's breath? • 3 Okay, I'll get going!)
text.es: Vuelve con el Guildmaster y pregúntale sobre los trozos del mapa para conseguir la llave, sobre la protección contra el aliento del dragón, y sobre la compra de un barco. (opciones de chat: 2 I talked to Oziach... • 1 How can I find the route to Crandor? • 1 Where is Melzar's Map piece? • 1 Where is Thalzar's Map piece? • 2 Where is Lozar's Map piece? • 3 Where can I find the right ship? • 2 How can I protect myself from the dragon's breath? • 3 Okay, I'll get going!)

text.en: Go to Melzar's Maze, north-west of Rimmington.
text.es: Ve a Melzar's Maze, al noroeste de Rimmington.

text.en: Enter the door with the maze key.
text.es: Entra por la puerta con la llave del laberinto.

text.en: Kill the small zombie rat with the long tail, pick up the red key and use it on the north-west door, then go up the ladder.
text.es: Mata a la pequeña rata zombi de cola larga, recoge la llave roja y úsala en la puerta del noroeste, luego sube por la escalera.

text.en: Kill the thin hooded ghost with the patterned robe to receive the orange key, go through the door second from the north on the eastern wall and climb the ladder.
text.es: Mata al fantasma delgado y encapuchado con la túnica estampada para recibir la llave naranja, atraviesa la puerta que está segunda desde el norte en la pared este y sube por la escalera.

text.en: Kill the skeleton with the small round shield and pick up the yellow key. Use the key on the south-western most door and climb down until you get to the zombies.
text.es: Mata al esqueleto con el pequeño escudo redondo y recoge la llave amarilla. Usa la llave en la puerta más al suroeste y baja hasta llegar a los zombis.

text.en: Kill the zombies. One of them will drop a blue key. Pass through the blue door.
text.es: Mata a los zombis. Uno de ellos soltará una llave azul. Atraviesa la puerta azul.

text.en: Kill Melzar the Mad, pick up the magenta key and pass through the magenta coloured door.
text.es: Mata a Melzar the Mad, recoge la llave magenta y atraviesa la puerta de color magenta.

text.en: Kill the lesser demon, pick up the green key, and go through the green door.
text.es: Mata al lesser demon, recoge la llave verde, y atraviesa la puerta verde.

text.en: Open the chest and search it for the map part.
text.es: Abre el cofre y regístralo para encontrar la parte del mapa.

text.en: Note: Make sure you finish the dialogue, or you will not receive the map part.
text.es: Nota: Asegúrate de terminar el diálogo, o no recibirás la parte del mapa.

text.en: Talk to the Oracle on Ice Mountain. (opciones de chat: 1 I seek a piece of the map to the island of Crandor.)
text.es: Habla con la Oracle en Ice Mountain. (opciones de chat: 1 I seek a piece of the map to the island of Crandor.)

text.en: Travel south into the dwarven mines. Find the room with a sealed door in the north-eastern area of the mine and use all the items on the "Magic door". (Unfired bowl, wizard's mind bomb, lobster pot or a crayfish cage, and silk)
text.es: Viaja al sur hacia las minas enanas. Encuentra la sala con una puerta sellada en la zona noreste de la mina y usa todos los objetos en la "Magic door". (Unfired bowl, wizard's mind bomb, lobster pot o una crayfish cage, y silk)

text.en: Open the chest in the room and search for the second map part after opening. You need to click again to search after the dialogue, it does not automatically loot or search.
text.es: Abre el cofre en la sala y busca la segunda parte del mapa tras abrirlo. Necesitas hacer clic de nuevo para buscar después del diálogo, no se recoge ni se registra automáticamente.

text.en: Head to Port Sarim Jail and talk to Wormbrain in the cell.
text.es: Dirígete a Port Sarim Jail y habla con Wormbrain en la celda.

text.en: You may need to speak with the Guild Master at this point before you can attack Wormbrain.
text.es: Puede que necesites hablar con el Guild Master en este punto antes de poder atacar a Wormbrain.

text.en: There are two ways to obtain the third map part:
text.es: Hay dos formas de conseguir la tercera parte del mapa:

text.en: Talk to Wormbrain and pay him 10,000 coins for the map part. (opciones de chat: 1 I believe you've got a piece of map that I need. • 3 I suppose I could pay you for the map piece... • 2 Alright then, 10,000 it is.)
text.es: Habla con Wormbrain y págale 10,000 monedas por la parte del mapa. (opciones de chat: 1 I believe you've got a piece of map that I need. • 3 I suppose I could pay you for the map piece... • 2 Alright then, 10,000 it is.)

text.en: Attack Wormbrain and use the loot interface or Telekinetic Grab to get the map part that he drops. You may need to drop an item in order for the loot interface to open.
text.es: Ataca a Wormbrain y usa la interfaz de botín o Telekinetic Grab para conseguir la parte del mapa que suelta. Puede que necesites soltar un objeto para que se abra la interfaz de botín.

text.en: Use a map part on any one of the other parts to form the complete Crandor map.
text.es: Usa una parte del mapa en cualquiera de las otras partes para formar el mapa completo de Crandor.

text.en: Talk to Duke Horacio on the of Lumbridge Castle. (opciones de chat: 1 I seek a shield that will protect me from dragonbreath. • 1 Elvarg, the dragon of Crandor island! • 1 Yes. • 2 So, are you going to give me the shield or not?)
text.es: Habla con Duke Horacio en el Lumbridge Castle. (opciones de chat: 1 I seek a shield that will protect me from dragonbreath. • 1 Elvarg, the dragon of Crandor island! • 1 Yes. • 2 So, are you going to give me the shield or not?)

text.en: You can also buy an anti-dragon shield from the Grand Exchange to skip this step entirely.
text.es: También puedes comprar un anti-dragon shield en el Grand Exchange para saltarte este paso por completo.

text.en: If the dialogue option for the anti-dragon shield doesn't appear, you need to talk to the Guildmaster about protection from dragon fire
text.es: Si no aparece la opción de diálogo para el anti-dragon shield, necesitas hablar con el Guildmaster sobre la protección contra el fuego del dragón.

text.en: If you haven't already, ask the Guildmaster in the Champions' Guild about the boat and the captain of the ship.
text.es: Si aún no lo has hecho, pregúntale al Guildmaster en el Champions' Guild sobre el barco y el capitán del navío.

text.en: In Port Sarim, buy the ship Lady Lumbridge from Klarense, by the Void knight Squire. (opciones de chat: 4 I'd like to buy her. • 1 Yep, sounds good.)
text.es: En Port Sarim, compra el barco Lady Lumbridge a Klarense, junto al Void knight Squire. (opciones de chat: 4 I'd like to buy her. • 1 Yep, sounds good.)

text.en: Repair the damaged deck of the ship.
text.es: Repara la cubierta dañada del barco.

text.en: Go to Draynor Village. In the house north-east of the bank talk to Ned. (opciones de chat: 2 Talk about something else. • 1 You're a sailor? Could you take me to Crandor?)
text.es: Ve a Draynor Village. En la casa al noreste del banco habla con Ned. (opciones de chat: 2 Talk about something else. • 1 You're a sailor? Could you take me to Crandor?)

text.en: Prepare the battle against Elvarg.
text.es: Prepárate para la batalla contra Elvarg.

text.en: Melee is recommended due to how hit chances are calculated.
text.es: Se recomienda usar combate cuerpo a cuerpo debido a cómo se calculan las probabilidades de golpe.

text.en: Players with level 37 Prayer can use Protect from Magic.
text.es: Los jugadores con nivel 37 de Oración pueden usar Protect from Magic.

text.en: Board your ship and talk to Ned. Tell him you're ready to sail to Crandor Isle. (opciones de chat: 1 Yes, let's go!)
text.es: Sube a tu barco y habla con Ned. Dile que estás listo para navegar hacia Crandor Isle. (opciones de chat: 1 Yes, let's go!)

text.en: After crashing on the island, follow the light grey path around and up to the top of the mountain. Climb down the hole.
text.es: Después de estrellarte en la isla, sigue el camino gris claro alrededor y hacia arriba hasta la cima de la montaña. Baja por el agujero.

text.en: Move past the skeletons until you see Elvarg behind a short wall of spikes protruding from the ground on the east.
text.es: Avanza más allá de los esqueletos hasta que veas a Elvarg detrás de un pequeño muro de picos que sobresalen del suelo al este.

text.en: Before you climb over to Elvarg its advisable to open the shortcut in the wall south of the short wall.
text.es: Antes de saltar hacia Elvarg, es recomendable abrir el atajo en la pared al sur del muro pequeño.

text.en: Climb over it and kill Elvarg.
text.es: Salta por encima y mata a Elvarg.

text.en: Wear your dragonfire protection before hopping over, or your stats will get drained resulting most likely in a failed kill.
text.es: Ponte tu protección contra el aliento de dragón antes de saltar, o tus estadísticas se verán drenadas, lo que probablemente resultará en un intento fallido.

text.en: If you leave Crandor before killing Elvarg or opening the shortcut, you will need 3 planks and 90 steel nails to repair the ship to get back.
text.es: Si abandonas Crandor antes de matar a Elvarg o de abrir el atajo, necesitarás 3 tablones y 90 clavos de acero para reparar el barco y poder regresar.

text.en: Take Elvarg's head to Oziach in Edgeville.
text.es: Lleva la cabeza de Elvarg a Oziach en Edgeville.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
